positive: An ethereal, mythological depiction of a serene forest nymph sitting by a crystalline stream. She is surrounded by bioluminescent flora and delicate glowing fireflies. Soft golden hour lighting, intricate detail, fantasy storybook illustration, renaissance painting influence.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, cyberpunk, cartoon
